testcase.name: HTMLToMarkdown > constructor > should initialize with default options
HTMLToMarkdown > constructor > should accept custom options
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should return empty string for null element
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should return empty string for undefined element
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert simple paragraph
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert heading tags
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert bold and italic text
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert inline code
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert code blocks
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert links when keepLinks is true
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should not convert links when keepLinks is false
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert unordered lists
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert ordered lists
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert nested lists
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert blockquotes
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert horizontal rules
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert images
testcase.system-err: Image element not found for src: image.png

testcase.name: HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should convert tables
HTMLToMarkdown > convert > should remove translation elements when removeTranslations is true
HTMLToMarkdown > removeTranslationElements > should remove immersive-translate elements
HTMLToMarkdown > isTranslationWrapper > should identify translation wrapper elements
HTMLToMarkdown > isTranslationWrapper > should return false for non-wrapper elements
HTMLToMarkdown > processTranslationNode > should combine original and translation text
HTMLToMarkdown > extractTranslationText > should extract text from translation inner wrapper
HTMLToMarkdown > extractTranslationText > should return empty string when no inner wrapper found
HTMLToMarkdown > extractOriginalText > should extract original text without translation elements
HTMLToMarkdown > a complex HTML document > should convert a complete document structure
